items.user_turn: Please convert my drafted seven-day Kyoto itinerary into a reservation-ready, time-stamped plan. Accommodation: Sakura Guesthouse (Kyoto); check-in 15:00, check-out 11:00. items.user_turn: Please turn the solo-safety protocol into a concrete, shareable plan for my upcoming weekend trip: I need a timed check-in schedule with escalation windows, ready-to-send emergency message templates (SMS and email), a guesthouse verification and arrival checklist, and step-by-step actions if I miss a check-in. Trip itinerary and times: depart Hometown by car at 8:00 AM on March 27, 2026 (Hometown -> Seaside, ~2.5 hours), expected arrival about 10:30 AM; expected late guesthouse arrival around 10:00 PM on March 27; return depart Seaside at 6:00 PM on March 29, 2026. Guesthouse details: Blue Fern Guesthouse, 78 Harbor Rd, Seaside, State, 54321; Reservation #BF-4592; front desk +1-555-222-3344; expected check-in ~10:00 PM on March 27. Emergency contact: Alex Morgan, friend, 555-123-4567. Medical info for emergencies: diagnosed generalized anxiety disorder, escitalopram 10 mg daily, allergic to penicillin. For check-ins I prefer an initial departure check, an ETA check, an evening arrival check, and location updates roughly every four hours while traveling. Can you build the timed schedule, pre-filled messages, guesthouse arrival checklist, and a clear escalation plan if I miss a check-in?
